bulk_email.compose_preview_fallback: You can still compose and preview, then use the BCC email-app option on the preview page.
bulk_email.setup_email_provider: Set up your email provider in advanced settings
bulk_email.marketing_checkbox: This is a marketing email (adds an unsubscribe footer and skips unsubscribed people)
bulk_email.preview_single_guidance: Preview to confirm the message before sending.
bulk_email.recipient_reach_outro: . That's everyone who gave an email address, de-duplicated. Preview to confirm the exact list for your final selection.
bulk_email.marketing_email_explainer: Marketing email. These go to people who gave you their address to book tickets, not to receive promotions. Over-using them can breach anti-spam rules (such as GDPR/PECR or CAN-SPAM) and damage your sender reputation. Every email gets an unsubscribe link, and anyone who has already unsubscribed is skipped automatically.
bulk_email.transactional_email_explainer: Transactional / service email. Treated as essential information about a listing someone booked. No unsubscribe footer is added and unsubscribed people are still included. Only use this for genuine listing info, never promotions.
bulk_email.unsubscribe_footer_notice: A personalized unsubscribe footer is appended to each marketing email.
bulk_email.manual_send_heading: Or send from your own email app
bulk_email.manual_send_single: This opens your email app with the message addressed straight to your one recipient.
bulk_email.manual_send_bulk: This opens your email app with everyone in BCC.
bulk_email.manual_send_warning: It needs no provider setup, but sending lots of mail this way, especially marketing, is a quick way to get your account rate-limited or blocked. It's best for small, genuinely transactional messages.
bulk_email.copy_addresses_description: Every address that will be emailed, separated by commas. Copy these into your own email tool if you'd rather send another way.
